name: io.github.goldentrii/novada-search
description: Search the web (5 engines), extract content from any URL, crawl websites, map site structure, run multi-step research, scrape 129 platforms, verify factual claims, unblock anti-bot pages, automate browser workflows, and check API health — routed through 100M+ proxy IPs across 195 countries.

tools.name: novada_search
tools.description: Search the web via Google, Bing, DuckDuckGo, Yahoo, or Yandex. Returns structured results with titles, URLs, snippets. Supports time range, date filters, domain include/exclude, and geo-targeting across 195 countries.

tools.name: novada_extract
tools.description: Extract main content, title, description, and same-domain links from one or multiple URLs (batch mode). Supports markdown, text, and HTML output. Pass url=[url1,url2] for parallel batch extraction.

tools.name: novada_crawl
tools.description: Crawl a website using BFS or DFS, extract content from multiple pages concurrently. Supports select_paths and exclude_paths regex filters, plus natural-language instructions for agent-side semantic filtering.

tools.name: novada_map
tools.description: Discover all URLs on a website without extracting content. BFS link collection with path-diverse queuing, max_depth control, and optional keyword filtering. Detects JavaScript SPAs automatically.

tools.name: novada_research
tools.description: Multi-step research: generates 3-10 parallel search queries, deduplicates up to 15 unique sources, returns cited report. depth=auto|quick|deep|comprehensive. Optional focus param narrows sub-query generation.

tools.name: novada_proxy
tools.description: Get Novada residential proxy configuration for use in HTTP clients, curl, or shell scripts. Returns proxy URL, shell export commands, or curl --proxy flag. Requires NOVADA_PROXY_USER, NOVADA_PROXY_PASS, NOVADA_PROXY_ENDPOINT env vars.

tools.name: novada_scrape
tools.description: Use when you need structured data from a specific platform — not raw HTML, but clean tabular records. Supports 129 platforms: Amazon, Reddit, TikTok, LinkedIn, Google Shopping, Glassdoor, GitHub, Zillow, Airbnb, and more. Best for: E-commerce product data, social posts/comments, job listings, reviews, real estate, market data. Output formats: "markdown" (default, agent-optimized table), "json" (structured, for programmatic use).

tools.name: novada_verify
tools.description: Use when you have a factual claim and need to check if it's supported by web sources. Runs 3 parallel searches (supporting, skeptical, fact-check angles) and returns a verdict: supported / unsupported / contested / insufficient_data. Best for: Checking claims before citing them, cross-validating research findings, detecting misinformation. Confidence 0–100 indicates certainty.

tools.name: novada_unblock
tools.description: Use when you need the raw rendered HTML of a blocked or JS-heavy page. Forces JS rendering via Web Unblocker or Browser API. Returns raw HTML, not cleaned text. Best for: When you need raw HTML for custom DOM parsing. When novada_extract with render="render" still fails. Use wait_for to specify a CSS selector to wait for before capturing HTML.

tools.name: novada_browser
tools.description: Use when you need to interact with a web page — click buttons, fill forms, scroll, take screenshots, or execute JavaScript. Chain multiple actions in one call for efficiency. Best for: Login flows, paginated content, interactive SPAs, form submission, visual verification, scraping behind user interactions. Actions: navigate, click, type, screenshot, aria_snapshot, evaluate, wait, scroll, hover, press_key, select — up to 20 per call.

tools.name: novada_health
tools.description: Check which Novada API products are active on your API key. Best for: First-time setup, diagnosing why a tool is failing, confirming your account has the right products activated. Returns: Status table for Search, Extract, Scraper API, Proxy, and Browser API — with activation links for anything not yet enabled.

prompts.name: research_topic
prompts.description: Deep multi-source research on any topic with optional country and focus constraints

prompts.name: extract_and_summarize
prompts.description: Extract content from one or more URLs and prepare a focused summary

prompts.name: site_audit
prompts.description: Map a website structure then extract and summarize key sections

prompts.name: scrape_platform_data
prompts.description: Scrape structured data from a specific platform (Amazon, Reddit, TikTok, LinkedIn, etc.) using the Novada Scraper API

prompts.name: browser_stateful_workflow
prompts.description: Automate a multi-step browser workflow with persistent session state (login, form submission, paginated scraping)

resources.name: Supported Search Engines
resources.description: List of search engines available in novada_search with characteristics and recommended use cases

resources.name: Supported Country Codes
resources.description: Country codes for geo-targeted search in novada_search. 195 countries supported.

resources.name: Agent Tool Selection Guide
resources.description: Decision tree and workflow patterns for choosing between all 11 novada tools: search, extract, crawl, map, research, proxy, scrape, verify, unblock, browser, health

resources.name: Supported Scraper Platforms
resources.description: Full list of platforms supported by novada_scrape with their operation IDs and required parameters. Read this before calling novada_scrape to find the correct platform and operation for your use case.

skills.name: novada-agent
skills.description: Tool selection guide for 11 Novada MCP tools — decision tree, key parameters, common workflows (research+extract, competitive analysis, full site docs, fresh news, proxy setup), and when NOT to use each tool.

environmentVariables.name: NOVADA_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Your Novada API key from https://www.novada.com
